xsl:stylesheet.extension-element-prefixes: datetime set math dateConversion myext nestedJsonParser string strings

ns1:query.xsl:variable: select id,customer_id,mobilenumber,client_id,firstname,midname,lastname,kyc_status,cnic,homeaddress,country,city,status,customertype, gender,nvl(placeofbirth,nationality)as placeofbirth ,nationality,dateofbirth,createdate,activationdate from wallet.cms_customer where createdate between to_date('
